VJs TV is the global broadcast network for VJ culture, audiovisual performances, and digital visual art. Watch live performances, discover artists, and explore the world of visual performance.

Follow Us

Submit Project

Share your visual performance work with the global VJ community. Submit your projects to be featured on VJs TV.

What to Submit

We're looking for outstanding audiovisual work across all categories.

Project Info
  • Artist / Collective Name
  • Project Title
  • Project Description
  • Video Link (YouTube / Vimeo)
  • Location
Technical Details
  • Technology Used
  • Studio (if applicable)
  • Project Type
  • Event (if applicable)
  • Social Links

Project Categories

Live Visuals Projection Mapping AI Visuals Generative Art Immersive Installations Dome Visuals Stage Visuals

Submit your project via our submission form
